sentences.translation: Walid je pokucao na vrata komšije.
sentences.translationEn: Walid knocked on his neighbor's door.

sentences.translation: Zatražio je od njega malo kafe.
sentences.translationEn: He asked him for a little coffee.

sentences.translation: Komšija mu je dao kafu i nasmiješio se.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbor gave him the coffee and smiled.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَهُ وَعَدَ أَنْ يُعِيدَ لَهُ ذَلِكَ.
sentences.translation: Zahvalio mu je i obećao da će mu uzvratiti.
sentences.translationEn: He thanked him and promised to return the favor.
